test.name: Create Talent From Vms Portal

kw.name: Run Keyword If
Open Portal And Login To Vms
Open Browser
kw.doc: Opens a new browser instance to the optional ``url``.

kw.name: Maximize Browser Window
kw.doc: Maximizes current browser window.

kw.name: Wait For Page Loader To Disappear
Run Keyword And Ignore Error
Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is not visible.

kw.arg: Wait Until Element Is Not Visible
kw.doc: Runs the given keyword with the given arguments and ignores possible error.

kw.name: Wait Until Element Is Visible
kw.doc: Waits until the element ``locator`` is visible.

kw.name: Providing Random Talent Details in Vms
Random Number
kw.doc: Generate a random integer according to the following rules:

kw.name: Street Address
kw.doc: :example: '791 Crist Parks'

kw.name: City
kw.doc: :example: 'Sashabury'

kw.name: Paragraph
kw.msg: ${summary} = Trouble north then relationship job report. Common develop item every knowledge girl.
kw.doc: Generate a paragraph.

kw.name: Date Of Birth
kw.doc: Generate a random date of birth represented as a Date object, constrained by optional miminimum_age and maximum_age parameters.

kw.name: Convert Date
kw.doc: Converts between supported `date formats`.
